testSummary: Cold pnpm test run TWICE (cache cleared): both green, 28/28 turbo tasks, 0 cached. Integration tier ran on real PG. Processor 47 passed + 1 skipped (fifo-localstack e2e). New: features-core 20 unit; features-aggregate 5 (AC1 rollups + replay no-double-count on real PG); features-workspace-scoping 2 (AC2 in-code scoping on BYPASSRLS pool). Phase 2/3 tests still pass.
commandsRun: rm -rf turbo cache && DATABASE_URL=... pnpm test (x2 cold)
notes: Pure fns: isEmailOpenType, isPurchaseLike, extractAmount (finite, default 0, never NaN), applyEventToFeatures (total+=1; last_event_at MAX; last_email_open_at MAX only on open; per-type counters; monetary += amount purchase-like). buildFeatureUpsert = single CTE: WITH ins AS (INSERT events ON CONFLICT(event_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING) INSERT profile_features SELECT ... AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM ins) ON CONFLICT(profile_id) DO UPDATE mirroring applyEventToFeatures; workspace_id $1; profile_id via (workspace_id,external_id) subquery; open-ts NULL for non-open so GREATEST preserves. planProcessing now [profileUpsert, eventInsert+featureUpsert CTE] so gate can't drift. ProfileFeatures type + OPEN/PURCHASE constants in shared. Idempotency proven: replay leaves aggregates unchanged, one events row. Segment eval (Phase 5) left as extension point. Fixed two cross-file collisions during cold run: added DELETE profile_features to existing cleanups (FK), and re-namespaced event_ids (global PK) so parallel integration files don't collide. turbo cache:false retained.
